summary: Composite conditions are high pressure at 30/100. Headline CPI was 2.4% year over year in 2026-02, with shelter at 3.0% and medical care services at 4.1%. The unemployment rate stood at 4.4%, while total nonfarm payrolls changed by -92.0 thousand month over month. Employment is deteriorating and price pressure is deteriorating, leaving household conditions stable only where labor resilience offsets housing and medical-cost drag.
